title: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 近实时语音翻译发布
full_text:
Google AI Developers on X: "Add near real-time voice translation to your apps with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate via the Gemini Live API. 🎙️
Watch how the model handles live broadcast ingestion and translation with continuous speech-to-speech streaming (S2ST) and synced transcripts, letting users tune into https://t.co/2xAJQjJlsM" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Google AI Developers
@googleaidevs
Add near real-time voice translation to your apps with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate via the Gemini Live API. 🎙️
Watch how the model handles live broadcast ingestion and translation with continuous speech-to-speech streaming (S2ST) and synced transcripts, letting users tune into in their native language.
00:00
9:36 PM · Jun 12, 2026 6K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 通过 Gemini Live API 中的 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate，为你的应用添加近实时语音翻译。🎙️ 观看模型如何处理实时直播流和翻译，包括连续语音到语音流（S2ST）和同步转录文本，让用户能以母语收听全球广播节目。
